name: qualia-v4-qverse-navigator
description: Once any context has a parentContextId the QverseNavigator panel auto-shows. Renders a 2D tree of contexts in the corner.

checkpoints.name: navigator-visible
checkpoints.description: Look at the bottom-right area of the screen. A small dark rounded panel should be visible with the heading 'QVERSE' (small-caps, muted color) at the top. Below the heading is a 2D tree view showing rounded rectangles for each context. Pass ONLY if: (1) the 'QVERSE' header is visible, (2) at least 3 context rectangles are rendered (the active root + the two children), (3) parent-to-child connector lines are drawn between rects, and (4) the currently active context rect has a teal ring/border distinguishing it from the others. Fail if the panel is missing, the header text is wrong, fewer than 3 rects render, or no rect appears to be 'active'.

checkpoints.name: navigator-not-overlapping
checkpoints.description: Same panel. Focus on overlap with the existing Minimap (which lives in the bottom-right by default). Pass if the QverseNavigator and Minimap are both visible and clearly separated (vertically stacked or otherwise non-overlapping). Fail if they sit on top of each other or one is clipped behind the other so the user can't read both.
